dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: While schema validation remained 100% successful, the 'rules-context-loader' completion tokens (4,791) represent a significant 52.5% decrease compared to the baseline (10,084). This suggests a less exhaustive ingestion of the architectural constraint set, potentially overlooking nuanced governance rules that were previously identified.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The 'architecture-work-to-evolution-map' remains robust but shows a reduction in descriptive depth (4,939 completion tokens vs. 6,234 baseline). Pipeline integrity is preserved with successful schema validation, but the lower verbosity indicates a more summarized analysis of the work-to-evolution logic.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The 'alignment-engine' performance is nearly identical to the baseline in terms of token output (3,380 vs. 3,487), maintaining consistency. However, the 'architecture-intent-generator' saw a slight further reduction (1,004 vs. 1,231), continuing the trend of concise intent resolution rather than deep exploration of alternative trade-offs.
